input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.8.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.8.5
            TITLE: mechanical inspection completion

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.8.5: Mechanical Inspection Completion
IN.8.5 Mechanical Inspection Completion  
All vehicles must pass Mechanical Technical Inspection before a vehicle may attempt any 
further inspections.

final_answer: All vehicles must pass Mechanical Technical Inspection before a vehicle may attempt any further inspections.
